examples: Mrs. Atkins told reporters she was not going to call the police because she was no longer angry.
When teacher Margret Atkins, 39, went to ride her bike to school last Friday, she was shocked to discover it was stolen.
Every year, Tara Atkins Smith collects warm clothes from her community in order to help the less lucky.
An Atkins food display that once occupied center stage has been relegated to the rear.
Of course the Atkins diet isn't the only diet to have received mixed reviews.
